company: TD Global Technology Leaders Index ETF
overview: The TD Global Technology Leaders Index ETF (TEC.TO) tracks the Solactive Global Technology Leaders Index CA, providing exposure to the world's largest technology companies. Top holdings include Apple, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, and other mega-cap tech leaders. TEC offers Canadian investors a CAD-denominated way to own global tech without buying individual U.S. stocks. With an MER of 0.39%, it is more expensive than broad-market ETFs but provides focused sector exposure to the technology sector that drives much of global equity returns.
bullCase: Concentrated exposure to global tech mega-caps — Apple, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta.
Technology sector has been the dominant driver of global equity returns for over a decade.
CAD-denominated, avoiding the need for currency conversion to buy U.S. tech stocks directly.
bearCase: Heavy concentration in a few mega-cap names — top 10 holdings dominate the portfolio.
Tech sector valuations are elevated, creating risk of sharp corrections.
MER of 0.39% is significantly higher than broad-market alternatives.
analystSummary: TEC is Canada's most popular tech sector ETF at 0.39% MER. It provides concentrated exposure to global tech mega-caps (Apple, Microsoft, NVIDIA, etc.) in a single CAD-denominated ticker.
seoDescription: Considering TEC? Read our analysis of TD Global Technology Leaders Index ETF — global tech mega-caps at 0.39% MER.
